allow: Bash(# In dev mode, Next.js uses a different module system - check the RSC payload curl -s ""http://localhost:3001/tx/austin/mueller-trail"" -H ""RSC: 1"")

Bash(npx tsc --noEmit --skipLibCheck --esModuleInterop --moduleResolution bundler --module esnext --target esnext scripts/generateTrailFaqs.ts scripts/lib/geminiVertex.ts scripts/lib/faqRules.ts scripts/lib/faqValidate.ts scripts/lib/io.ts)

Bash(python3 -c "import sys; data = sys.stdin.read\(\); print\(''FOUND'' if ''Frequently Asked'' in data or ''frequently-asked'' in data or ''faqs'' in data.lower\(\) else ''NOT FOUND''\); print\(''trail_found'' if ''Trail not found'' not in data else ''trail_not_found''\)")

Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); t=d[''trail'']; print\(json.dumps\({k:t[k] for k in [''id'',''slug'',''name'']}, indent=2\)\)")
Bash(# The map is dynamically imported, so it''s in a separate chunk curl -s ""http://localhost:3000/tx/austin/country-club-creek-trail-c492e5a7"")
Bash(# Check if the dev server would return a webpack chunk that contains the map code curl -s ""http://localhost:3000/_next/static/chunks/webpack.js"")

Bash(# The trail name might be coming from InstantDB client-side. Let''s check the page.js chunk for our filter code curl -s ""http://localhost:3000/_next/static/chunks/app/\(site\)/%5Bstate%5D/%5Bcity%5D/%5BtrailSlug%5D/page.js"")
Bash(# The map is dynamically imported, find its chunk curl -s ""http://localhost:3000/_next/static/chunks/app/\(site\)/%5Bstate%5D/%5Bcity%5D/%5BtrailSlug%5D/page.js"")

Bash(# In Next.js dev, dynamic chunks are loaded by module path. Let''s find the actual chunk URL curl -s ""http://localhost:3000/_next/static/chunks/app/\(site\)/%5Bstate%5D/%5Bcity%5D/%5BtrailSlug%5D/page.js"")

Bash(# In Next.js dev, the dynamic import creates a /_next/static/chunks/ entry. Let me fetch it via the HMR endpoint curl -s ""http://localhost:3000/_next/static/chunks/components_trail_TrailSegmentsMap_tsx.js"")

Bash(# Find the dynamically-loaded map chunk in .next-dev find /Users/michalpekarcik/barkTrails/.next-dev/static/chunks -name ""*.js"" | xargs grep -l ""activeOverlay\\|toggleOverlay\\|highlightKindColor"")
